KHAS Academics in the Top 6000 at Google Scholar!

The recent rankings of the

“Top 6000 academics who are most cited and receive the highest H Index score in Turkey”

according to Google Scholar, whose database provides a broadly search for scholarly literature across a wide variety of disciplines and sources, includes the names of Kadir Has University’s several academics from different departments such as Civil Engineering, Economics, Electrical-Electronics Engineering, Energy Systems Engineering, Industrial Engineering, International Relations, Mechatronics Engineering, Molecular Biology and Genetics, and Psychology.

We congratulate our academics in the Top 6000 and thank them for their valuable contributions strengthening KHAS’s goal to become a research university

Note: The names of the academics in the following table are listed according to the H Index and the number of citations based on Google Scholar data of 15-20 March 2021.
